title: THETA Control Room — Build Hook Delta

changedProjects.lastKnownStatus: Build hook reported latest project state.
changedProjects.nextAction: v0.4.26 — DEEPER RED + REAL VU BALLISTICS. (1) DEEP RED: new EC::deepRed (#B01410) — coral was an orange, this is an actual red. Applied to the LIMIT tile lamp (EB::Lamp::red ramp rebuilt deeper + its leak colour), the COMPRESS G/R heavy-reduction segments (were amber #d89848), and the METERING GR bar/label/readout. (2) THE VU/GR LOOKALIKE — user asked where the VU meters get their data and noticed they mirror the GR meter. They read proc.summingLevel, a post-summing (pre-EQ/limiter) tap. The tap was per-block PEAK, and peak is exactly what a compressor GR meter follows, so both chased the same transient envelope. FIXED at both ends: the tap now publishes RMS (mean-square accumulated per sample over the block, sqrt at block end — metering only, audio untouched), and McIntoshVuMeter uses true VU ballistics (~300ms, alpha 0.10/0.085 at 30Hz, was a 0.45/0.22 peak chase) with 0 VU aligned to -18 dBFS RMS. VERIFY IN ABLETON: the VU needles should now swing smoothly and average program level instead of tracking the GR meter; GR + LIMIT read deep red. OPEN: painted-metal chassis fork; deferred patina surfaces.
